debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
pSpec : ProtocolSpec n
ι : Type
oSpec : OracleSpec ι
OuterStmtIn OuterStmtOut InnerStmtIn InnerStmtOut : Type
inst✝¹ : (i : pSpec.ChallengeIdx) → SampleableType (pSpec.Challenge i)
σ : Type
init : ProbComp σ
impl : QueryImpl oSpec (StateT σ ProbComp)
inst✝ : Inhabited InnerStmtOut
outerLangIn : Set OuterStmtIn
outerLangOut : Set OuterStmtOut
innerLangIn : Set InnerStmtIn
innerLangOut : Set InnerStmtOut
rbrSoundnessError : pSpec.ChallengeIdx → NNReal
lens : Statement.Lens OuterStmtIn OuterStmtOut InnerStmtIn InnerStmtOut
V : Verifier oSpec InnerStmtIn InnerStmtOut pSpec
lensSound :
  Statement.Lens.IsSound outerLangIn outerLangOut innerLangIn innerLangOut
    (Verifier.compatStatement n pSpec ι oSpec OuterStmtIn OuterStmtOut InnerStmtIn InnerStmtOut lens V) lens
stF : StateFunction init impl innerLangIn innerLangOut V
h :
  ∀ stmtIn ∉ innerLangIn,
    ∀ (WitIn WitOut : Type) (witIn : WitIn) (prover : Prover oSpec InnerStmtIn WitIn InnerStmtOut WitOut pSpec)
      (a : Fin n) (b : pSpec.dir a = Direction.V_to_P),
      Pr[fun x => ¬stF.toFun a.castSucc stmtIn x.1 ∧ stF.toFun a.succ stmtIn (Transcript.concat x.2 x.1) | do
          let __do_lift ← init
          let a_1 ←
            ((simulateQ rbrSoundness_queryImpl).toFun (Transcript a.castSucc pSpec × prover.PrvState a.castSucc)
                    (Prover.runToRound a.castSucc stmtIn witIn prover)).run
                __do_lift
          (fun a_2 => (a_1.1.1, a_2.1)) <$>
              ((simulateQ rbrSoundness_queryImpl).toFun (pSpec.Type a) (liftM (pSpec.getChallenge ⟨a, b⟩))).run a_1.2] ≤
        ↑(rbrSoundnessError ⟨a, b⟩)
⊢ ∃ stateFunction,
    ∀ stmtIn ∉ outerLangIn,
      ∀ (WitIn WitOut : Type) (witIn : WitIn) (prover : Prover oSpec OuterStmtIn WitIn OuterStmtOut WitOut pSpec)
        (a : Fin n) (b : pSpec.dir a = Direction.V_to_P),
        Pr[fun x =>
            ¬stateFunction.toFun a.castSucc stmtIn x.1 ∧ stateFunction.toFun a.succ stmtIn (Transcript.concat x.2 x.1) |
            do
            let __do_lift ← init
            let a_1 ←
              ((simulateQ rbrSoundness_queryImpl).toFun (Transcript a.castSucc pSpec × prover.PrvState a.castSucc)
                      (Prover.runToRound a.castSucc stmtIn witIn prover)).run
                  __do_lift
            (fun a_2 => (a_1.1.1, a_2.1)) <$>
                ((simulateQ rbrSoundness_queryImpl).toFun (pSpec.Type a) (liftM (pSpec.getChallenge ⟨a, b⟩))).run
                  a_1.2] ≤
          ↑(rbrSoundnessError ⟨a, b⟩)

proof:
refine ⟨stF.liftContext lens (lensSound := lensSound), ?_⟩
  intro outerStmtIn hOuterStmtIn WitIn WitOut witIn outerP roundIdx hDir
  let innerP : Prover oSpec InnerStmtIn WitIn InnerStmtOut WitOut pSpec := {
    PrvState := outerP.PrvState
    input := fun _ => outerP.input (outerStmtIn, witIn)
    sendMessage := outerP.sendMessage
    receiveChallenge := outerP.receiveChallenge
    output := fun state => do
      let ⟨outerStmtOut, outerWitOut⟩ ← outerP.output state
      pure ⟨default, outerWitOut⟩
  }
  have h_eq : ∀ i, Prover.runToRound i outerStmtIn witIn outerP =
      Prover.runToRound i (lens.proj outerStmtIn) witIn innerP := by
    intro i
    induction i using Fin.induction with
    | zero => simp [Prover.runToRound]; rfl
    | succ i ih =>
      simp [Prover.runToRound, ih, Prover.processRound]
      rfl
  specialize h (lens.proj outerStmtIn) (lensSound.proj_sound _ hOuterStmtIn)
    WitIn WitOut witIn innerP roundIdx hDir
  simp [Verifier.StateFunction.liftContext]
  rw [h_eq]
  exact h
failed_attempts:
refine ⟨stF.liftContext lens (lensSound := lensSound), ?_⟩
  intro outerStmtIn hOuterStmtIn WitIn WitOut witIn outerP roundIdx hDir
  let innerP : Prover oSpec InnerStmtIn WitIn InnerStmtOut WitOut pSpec := {
    PrvState := outerP.PrvState
    input := fun _ => outerP.input (outerStmtIn, witIn)
    sendMessage := outerP.sendMessage
    receiveChallenge := outerP.receiveChallenge
    output := fun state => do
      let ⟨outerStmtOut, outerWitOut⟩ ← outerP.output state
      return ⟨default, outerWitOut⟩
  }
  have h_run (i : Fin (n + 1)) : innerP.runToRound i (lens.proj outerStmtIn) witIn =
      outerP.runToRound i outerStmtIn witIn := by
    induction i using Fin.induction with
    | zero => simp [Prover.runToRound]
    | succ i ih => simp [Prover.runToRound, Prover.processRound, ih]
  rw [← h_run]
  exact h (lens.proj outerStmtIn) (lensSound.proj_sound _ hOuterStmtIn) WitIn WitOut witIn innerP roundIdx hDir

    | zero => simp [Prover.runToRound]; rfl

  intro outerStmtIn hOuterStmtIn WitIn WitOut witIn outerP roundIdx hDir
